overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in an orange outfit exploring a medieval fantasy stone environment at night, transitioning from enclosed corridors to an open courtyard with a scenic mountain view.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone corridor with dining area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow covered corridor with stone walls and industrial piping overhead

entered.detail: overhead stone roof covering the corridor
wooden table and chairs against the left wall
metal safety railing running along the right side
rough stone wall texture on the left side
rough stone wall texture on the right side
stone steps leading upward visible at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow covered stone corridor with wooden dining furniture on the left and metal railings on the right. Industrial pipes run overhead as the character approaches a stone stairway at the end of the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone stairway ascending through the structure

events.description: passing a hooded figure descending the stairs in the opposite direction
transitioning from enclosed artificial lighting to outdoor night air with sky visibility

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs through a narrow passage, passing another character going down

notable_agents.action: hooded figure descending the stairs downward while the character ascends

entered.detail: circular metal ventilation grate mounted on the left wall
metal piping running along the ceiling
dark night sky becoming visible as the character approaches the outdoor section

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a narrow stone stairway, passing a hooded NPC descending in the opposite direction. The environment transitions from fully enclosed to partially outdoor, with the night sky becoming visible overhead as the character continues climbing.

scene_state.functional_zone: open courtyard with ornate lamp structure overlooking mountain valley

events.description: exiting narrow stairway into open plaza with panoramic mountain view

agents.ego_description: walking around the open courtyard, approaching the ornate lamp structure and looking out at the mountain vista

entered.detail: large multi-tiered ornate lantern or shrine structure with internal lighting
low stone wall serving as a balcony parapet overlooking the valley
snow-capped mountains and valley visible in the distance under night sky
large wooden storage crate on the stone pavement

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into an open courtyard featuring a prominent ornate lit structure and a stone balcony wall. The camera pans to reveal a sweeping view of the mountainous landscape under the night sky as the character explores the elevated plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped, industrial stone corridor into a vast, open-air mountain plaza at night. It begins by following a character through a narrow covered passage lined with wooden dining furniture and overhead pipes, moving steadily toward a stone stairway. As the character ascends the stairs and passes a hooded figure, the environment shifts from a fully enclosed space to a partially outdoor setting where the night sky first becomes visible. The scene then opens completely as the character emerges into a wide courtyard featuring an ornate lit structure and a stone balcony. Finally, the camera pans away from the plaza to reveal a sweeping, panoramic view of a mountainous landscape under the dark sky.
